title: licania orbicularis
intro: Licania orbicularis, also known as the round-leaf licania, is a plant species belonging to the family Chrysobalanaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Licania orbicularis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
